---
title: "`r params$party` (`r params$country`, `r params$year`)"
subtitle: "manifesto_id `r params$doc_id`"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
params:
  doc_id: ""
  party: ""
  country: ""
  year: ""
  partyname: ""
  language: ""
  parfam: ""
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
source("../_data.R")
library(htmltools); library(knitr); library(ggplot2)
DOC <- params$doc_id
# Per-model aggregated scores for this doc
models <- available_models()
score_rows <- map_dfr(names(models), function(mid) {
  a <- load_model_agg(mid)
  if (is.null(a)) return(NULL)
  r <- a[a$doc_id == DOC, ]
  if (nrow(r) == 0) return(NULL)
  r |> select(any_of(V4_DIMS)) |> mutate(model = mid, .before = 1)
})

# Evidence (verbatim quotes) for every model × dim
ev <- load_evidence(DOC)
```

::: {.manifesto-meta}
[**Country**]{.item} `r params$country` ·
[**Party**]{.item} `r params$party` (`r params$partyname`) ·
[**Year**]{.item} `r params$year` ·
[**Language**]{.item} `r params$language` ·
[**parfam**]{.item} `r params$parfam`
:::

::: {.callout-note appearance="simple"}
**Get full text:** This site shows derived annotations and short verbatim
quotes only. The full manifesto text is © Manifesto Project / WZB — obtain
it via [manifesto-project.wzb.eu](https://manifesto-project.wzb.eu/) using
the `manifesto_id` above.
:::

## Headline scores

```{r headline, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(score_rows) == 0) {
  cat("*No data available for this manifesto yet.*\n")
} else {
  headline_dims <- c("populism_overall","pop_anti_elitism","pop_people_centrism","pop_manichean",
                     "pop_ideology_overall",
                     "liberalism_overall","lib_political","lib_social","lib_economic","lib_financial_market")
  htmlcells <- list()
  for (d in headline_dims) {
    if (!d %in% names(score_rows)) next
    cells <- c(htmltools::htmlEscape(DIM_LABELS[d]))
    for (mid in names(models)) {
      v <- score_rows[score_rows$model == mid, d, drop = TRUE]
      v <- if (length(v) == 0) NA else v
      cells <- c(cells, score_badge_html(v))
    }
    htmlcells[[length(htmlcells)+1]] <- paste0("<tr><td>", cells[1], "</td>",
      paste(paste0("<td style='text-align:center'>", cells[-1], "</td>"), collapse=""), "</tr>")
  }
  headcells <- paste0("<th>Dimension</th>",
                      paste(paste0("<th style='text-align:center'>", map_chr(models, "short"), "</th>"), collapse=""))
  cat('<table class="compact">\n<thead><tr>', headcells, '</tr></thead>\n<tbody>\n',
      paste(htmlcells, collapse = "\n"), '\n</tbody></table>\n', sep = "")
}
```

## Evidence per dimension

```{r evidence, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
if (nrow(ev) == 0) {
  cat("*No verbatim evidence available for this manifesto yet.*\n")
} else {
  ev <- ev |> arrange(dim_name, model)
  for (d in unique(ev$dim_name)) {
    cat(sprintf("\n### %s\n\n", DIM_LABELS[d] %||% d))
    sub <- ev |> filter(dim_name == d)
    for (i in seq_len(nrow(sub))) {
      r <- sub[i, ]
      hi <- highlight_quote_in_context(r$quote, r$context)
      cat(sprintf(
        '<div class="evidence-block %s"><span class="source-tag">%s · score %.1f · %s · chunk %s</span><div class="quote">"%s"</div><span class="context">%s</span></div>\n\n',
        r$model, models[[r$model]]$short %||% r$model,
        r$score, r$status %||% "?",
        r$chunk_id %||% "?",
        htmltools::htmlEscape(r$quote), hi))
    }
  }
}
```

## Scores at a glance

```{r plot, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
# Client-side render via Observable Plot — saves ~50 KB per page vs embedded PNG.
if (nrow(score_rows) > 0) {
  long <- score_rows |>
    pivot_longer(any_of(V4_DIMS), names_to = "dim", values_to = "score") |>
    filter(is.finite(score)) |>
    transmute(
      score = round(score, 2),
      dim_lbl = unname(DIM_LABELS[dim]),
      model_lbl = unname(sapply(model, function(m) models[[m]]$short %||% m)),
      group = unname(DIM_GROUP[dim])
    )
  # Stable ordering used by the JS plot
  long$dim_lbl <- factor(long$dim_lbl, levels = unname(DIM_LABELS[V4_DIMS]))
  json <- jsonlite::toJSON(long, dataframe = "rows", auto_unbox = TRUE)
  dim_order <- jsonlite::toJSON(unname(DIM_LABELS[V4_DIMS]), auto_unbox = TRUE)
  group_order <- jsonlite::toJSON(c("Populism","Ideology","Liberalism"), auto_unbox = TRUE)
  cat(sprintf('
<div id="manifesto-plot"></div>
<script src="../assets/manifesto-plot.js"></script>
<script>
  window.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
    renderManifestoPlot("manifesto-plot", %s, {dimOrder: %s, groupOrder: %s});
  });
</script>
', json, dim_order, group_order))
}
```
